title: centranthus calcitrapae var. trichocarpus
intro: Centranthus calcitrapae var. trichocarpus, also known as Rock Valerian or Red Valerian, is a variety of flowering plant in the Valerianaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, diuretic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Herbal preparations of Rock Valerian can be consumed as a tea, tincture, or added to supplements, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions.
